summary: Snapshot() formats snapshot_at with time.RFC3339Nano so sub-second concurrent Snapshot() calls cannot collide on the composite PK.
reason: Greptile review (PR #576): RFC3339 (second precision) + INSERT OR IGNORE on (snapshot_at, sku_kind, sku_id) silently dropped any row whose timestamp collided with an existing one. Agent-loop modes (--tail, parallel health checks) hit this window. RFC3339Nano keeps the same TEXT column shape but makes real collisions astronomically unlikely.
validated_outcome: go build, go vet, go test ./internal/pricebook/ all clean
